message:
feat: add status color mappings for deferred, draft, pinned, hooked, review, and tombstone

Extend GetStatusColor switch in theme.go to return the correct
adaptive color for six previously unmapped bead statuses:
- deferred/draft -> Deferred
- pinned -> Pinned
- hooked -> Hooked
- review -> Review
- closed (reordered)
- tombstone -> Tombstone

Without these cases, all six fell through to the default Subtext color,
making them visually indistinguishable from unknown statuses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -157,8 +157,18 @@ func (t Theme) GetStatusColor(s string) lipgloss.AdaptiveColor {
 		return t.InProgress
 	case "blocked":
 		return t.Blocked
+	case "deferred", "draft":
+		return t.Deferred
+	case "pinned":
+		return t.Pinned
+	case "hooked":
+		return t.Hooked
+	case "review":
+		return t.Review
 	case "closed":
 		return t.Closed
+	case "tombstone":
+		return t.Tombstone
 	default:
 		return t.Subtext
 	}
